subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
$Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up. I’d be glad to arrange a meeting to discuss potential partnership opportunities.

The following time windows are available:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

If one of those works for you, please let me know your preferred time within the window and we can coordinate the call.

I’m not able to share internal contact details or direct phone numbers. For general contact information, please refer to our public website.

Best regards
